title: Resources
text:
This (somewhat Macalester-specific) student resources document and this Quarto website guide, both created by Professor Brianna Heggeseth, first got me interested in creating a website.
I had never used git or Github prior to this project. The UC Santa Barbara Bren School of Environmental Science and Management’s software installation guide was a great introduction to how to configure both.
Now, working with Quarto, I’m constantly referencing Sam Shanny-Csik’s materials - her resources are so approachable, thorough, and easy to understand:

Creating your personal website using Quarto
Creating your own personal branding guide (under the ‘Pre-class prep’ section)
Customizing Quarto websites slideshow

title: Sophia Spisak
text:
Hi! I’m Sophia Spisak. I’m a junior at Macalester College in St. Paul, MN, majoring in Geography with minors in Geospatial Science and Data Science.
Please see my About page to learn more. My Projects page includes both academic and non-academic work, and my Resources page includes materials that have been helpful in learning how to build this website. Thanks for visiting!

title: About
text:
Education
Macalester College (2024-present)  BA in Geography with Geospatial Science and Data Science minors, expected Spring 2027
Carleton College (2023-2024)
